figures.caption: Figure 2: Results of the temporal accuracy test for N = 3, K = 6, Rf = Rm = c = h = 1, and ∆t ∈ { 1 9 , 1 10 , · · · , 1 14 } .
Figure 3: Results of the spatial accuracy test for Rf = Rm = c = h = 1, ∆ = 1 100 and N ∈ {1, 2}. For N = 1, K ∈ {16, 18, · · · , 26}. And for N = 2, K ∈ {12, 14, 16, 18}.

Figure 4: Left: An illustration of the mesh used in the structure-preservation test for K = 3. Right: The two-dimensional version of the mesh for K = 15 that more clearly illustrates the distortion in the mesh.
